plugin.name: VoiceHub Playlist
plugin.description: Display VoiceHub radio station daily playlist with song information in order.
settings.api_url_desc: VoiceHub radio station API URL for fetching playlist data.
settings.refresh_interval_desc: Time interval for auto-refreshing playlist data, range 1-1440 minutes.
settings.show_requester_desc: Display the requester name in song information.
settings.max_display_count_desc: Maximum number of songs to display in the widget, range 1-50.
header.title: VoiceHub Playlist
